task_completion.description: Log into Emoncms and navigate to the Feeds page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the Emoncms interface at http://localhost, logged in as admin, with the 'Feeds' page open displaying a list of feeds.

task_completion.description: Open the edit interface for the 'Appliances' feed
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit modal, dialog, or inline editing interface is open for the feed originally named 'Appliances' (which initially had the tag 'power').

task_completion.description: Change the feed name to 'Appliances Power'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Appliances Power' is visible inside the feed name input field.
The text 'appliances' (all lowercase) is visible inside the feed tag input field.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the updated feed list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Feeds list is visible again, clearly showing the updated feed with the Tag 'appliances' and the Name 'Appliances Power'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Emoncms GUI via a web browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface (e.g., Chromium/Firefox) navigating the Emoncms web UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or Python API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser Developer Tools to fake the result
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser Developer Tools (Inspect Element) are not open or being used to superficially alter the DOM text to read 'Appliances Power'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Emoncms application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Emoncms web application layout (typically a blue/white theme with a sidebar or top navigation), not a text editor or a locally fabricated HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Emoncms is an open-source web application for energy monitoring. The target feed initially has the Name 'Appliances' and the Tag 'power'. The task requires changing the Name to 'Appliances Power' and the Tag to 'appliances' (lowercase). The programmatic verifier for this task is a stub, meaning visual confirmation of the final state in the Emoncms Feeds list is the only way to validate success.
